extDesc.message: A pomodoro timer with a tiny pet that grows with your focus. It works at its desk while you work — and catches you slacking.

focus_start.message: The Ember beats with you. Focus for $M min!

focus_done.message: Session done: +$N 🔥$X · growth based on minutes

streak_none.message: Complete a daily session to start your streak.

always_on.message: Your creature will roam every website

pack_lock.message: Pack mode is a Pro feature

forge_lock.message: The Forge is a Pro feature (3/month).

egg_cost_msg.message: Costs $N 🔥. Embers are earned, never bought.

egg_new.message: A new egg awaits your taps.

pro_pitch.message: With Pro: The Forge, 3 creatures together, cosmetics and x1.5 🔥. Eggs are NEVER bought with real money.

pro_activated.message: ⭐ Pro activated! Thanks for supporting the Forge.

ai_active.message: Active: dialogues run on your device.

upsell.message: 💡 With Pro, your creatures roam and chat together daily.

poop_corner.message: To my corner, as you taught me. 😌

hint_egg.message: The warmth of a focus session will hatch the egg 🔥

res_empty.message: Empty. Archive creatures with 📦 to raise more eggs.

focus_note.message: Every 5 completed minutes → +1 Ember and +1 growth (Pro: x1.5 🔥). It keeps running even if you close the popup.

minis_note.message: Max 3 rounds of each per day. Fishing stocks the pantry with 🐟; in the yarn ball your own creature plays.

pets_note.message: Strolling creatures can roam your screen together. The Reserve 📦 keeps the rest with time frozen; releasing 🕊️ is forever.

screen_note.message: "Summon" only acts on the current tab. "Always" will ask permission for all sites and your creature will roam every page you visit. You can turn it off anytime.

visit_ph.message: Paste a friend's creature code here…

poop_3.message: 💩 That wasn't $N. It was the wind. Honest.

poop_4.message: 💩 $N is watching you. You know what to do.

mg_pesca_note.message: Press when the needle is in the amber zone. The bright center = rare fish.

mg_ovillo_note.message: Move the yarn and keep your creature hooked: you score while it chases closely and the yarn moves.

mg_ovillo_result.message: $P points → +10 mood and +1 bond$H. $N sprawls out, exhausted and happy.

visit_alias.message: Your name or alias (your friend will see it):

visit_none.message: Hasn't met anyone yet. Exchange codes with a friend.

forge_note.message: The Forge changes looks and temperament while keeping progress (stage, bond, Embers).

forge_confirm.message: Reforge $N? Looks and temperament will change; progress is kept.

tool_ovillo_d.message: 25 s of play and bigger radius

ai_dl_fail.message: The download couldn't start on this device.

confirm_deact.message: Deactivate the license on this device? You can activate it on another.

confirm_release.message: Release $N? It will return free to the Forge. This can't be undone.

confirm_newegg.message: Spend $P 🔥 on a mystery egg? It will incubate in the stable with your next focus.

bring_full.message: Stroll slots are full. Archive one first.

bring_pro.message: The second stroll slot is Pro

multi_pro.message: More than one creature is a Pro feature.

say_hello.message: Hi! 👋 I was missing you already.

poop_edu.message: 💩 $N went to its corner, like you taught it.

best_note.message: Each species unlocks the first time it is born or reforged. Fantastical creatures are rarer.

lic_permission.message: We need your permission to reach the license server. Press Activate again and accept it.

lic_rejected.message: Invalid or expired key (check your purchase email).

lic_server_error.message: Could not reach the server. Try again in a moment.

lic_wrong_product.message: This key belongs to another Wendygo Studio product.

lic_network.message: No connection. Activation needs internet once.

imp_confirm.message: Replace your current save with the file? This cannot be undone.

imp_bad.message: That file doesn't look like a SlimeForge save.

save_note.message: Local copy of your save as a JSON file. Everything stays on your device — no cloud, no accounts.

wit_none.message: No comebacks learned yet. Watch for the challenging wild slime on the page…

report_line.message: Yesterday: $N focus sessions ($M min). Streak: $R 🔥 More today!

dev_lbl.message: Speeds the game ×10 and enables page shortcuts

dev_note.message: With the creature on a page: Alt+Shift + D duel · W wild slime · L laser · Z zoomies · B box · M pack encounter · P thought · G garden watering. Events every 25-60 s, the creature never sleeps.

huerto_note.message: Drops 💧 are collected by tapping the puddles your creature leaves while strolling. Each stage needs one watering; without water the plant waits, it never dies.

huerto_gotas_lbl.message: You have $N 💧 · tap an empty plot to plant

huerto_no_gotas.message: You need more drops 💧: walk your creature and tap its puddles

huerto_eat.message: $S Yum! From the garden to the belly.

huerto_screen_lbl.message: Garden on screen (next to your creature)

seed_flor_d.message: 14 💧 · 14 h · 3 petals 🌸 for the Workshop · passive mood aura while growing

tool_regadera_d.message: Watering one plot waters ALL pending ones

focus_social_note.message: 👀 If you visit social media during a focus session, your creature will call you out (if it's strolling on the page).

cos_note.message: Free pieces are earned by playing (focus, duels, garden, drops, collection). Golden 🔒 pieces are Pro. Nothing is bought with randomness.

cosc_colosal.message: Reach Colossal for the first time

logros_note.message: Each milestone unlocks a Wardrobe piece. Earned by playing, never by chance.

perks_head_trial.message: Right now you have all of Pro:

perks_head_lost.message: With the trial over, these are paused:

perk_will_pause.message: · you're using it now; it'll pause when the trial ends

perks_safe.message: Nothing is deleted: when the trial ends your creatures, cosmetics and progress stay saved. Only Pro features pause until you activate a license; when you do, they return exactly as they were.

perkd_multi.message: Up to 3 creatures, pack mode and an expanded reserve of 25.

perkd_pack.message: Your stable creatures stroll the web together.

perkd_reserve.message: Store up to 25 creatures instead of 10.

perkd_cos.message: Animal parts, auras, embers and exclusive palettes in the Wardrobe.

perkd_focus.message: Earn ×1.5 embers 🔥 when you complete focus sessions (the currency for forging new creatures).

perkd_acc.message: Hat and monocle for your creature.

perkd_forge.message: Full redesign, exclusive cosmetics and accessories. 3 forges a month.

egg_focus_hint.message: It needs the warmth of your focus. Start a session!

egg_inc_note.message: Your first completed session will hatch the egg. It keeps running even if you close the popup.

ob_d1.message: A unique creature sleeps inside — one of 16 species. No one knows which.

ob_d2.message: Complete your first pomodoro session and it will hatch. Your focus is its warmth.

dnd_empty.message: No muted sites. Use the 🔕 button on the on-page timer.

hatch_roam_d.message: It can join you on your pages while you work: it sets up its desk during focus and calls you out if you slack. You can turn it off anytime.

roam_next_page.message: Done — it will appear on the next website you open 🐾

born_stable.message: The egg in the stable hatched: it’s $NAME!

egg_stable_hint.message: The egg waits in the stable: your next completed focus session will hatch it.

goal_label.message: What do you want to complete?

goal_plan_pro.message: Local planning with Nano is a PRO feature.

goal_plan_fallback.message: Start with the smallest verifiable part of the goal.

review_pet_notyet.message: We’ll keep it for the next session.

memory_empty.message: Your first memories will appear as you focus and evolve.

minis_note_early.message: Fish for food from birth. New games will appear as you complete focus sessions.

birth_copy.message: Your creature is now a Spark. Every focus session will help it and its forest grow.

test_note.message: Speeds up timers and simulation. Do not use for real statistics.

lore_generic.message: A unique Forge creature with its own way of keeping you company and focused.

streak_shield_ready.message: Shield ready: it will protect one missed day

streak_shield_desc.message: Protect one missed day without breaking your streak

expedition_empty.message: Choose a route and creature; every focus session advances the journey

expedition_pro_preview.message: Journeys with rewards, relics and exclusive memories

expedition_species_bonus.message: ✨ Species affinity: one fewer session required

expedition_no_bonus.message: This species has no affinity with this route

route_desc_forest.message: Short route · $N sessions · petals and one relic

route_desc_ruins.message: Medium route · $N sessions · scales and two relics

route_desc_lagoon.message: Long route · $N sessions · thread and three relics

weekly_tip_consistency.message: Keep the same schedule: your consistency is already working.

weekly_tip_small.message: Reduce your next goal to one small, verifiable step.

weekly_tip_start.message: Complete a first session to discover your weekly pattern.

weekly_pro_lock.message: The smart weekly report is a PRO feature

reaction_expedition.message: I knew they would return with something shiny!

reaction_streak_saved.message: The shield kept our streak alive!

reaction_streak_record.message: New best streak! This is becoming a tradition.

test_streak_ready.message: Case prepared: complete a focus session to test the shield

perkd_expedition.message: Three unlimited routes, affinities, loot and relics.

perkd_weekly.message: Private Nano interpretation, patterns and trends.

pro_free_compare.message: Free includes focus, Nano goal planning, basic Shield, 3 projects, report and one weekly expedition. PRO expands capacity, analysis and world.

expedition_free_ready.message: Your free weekly Forest expedition is available

expedition_free_wait.message: The free expedition returns in $N day(s)

expedition_free_note.message: Free: one Forest journey a week, 6 Embers and one material.

expedition_affinity_pro.message: PRO unlocks affinities, relics and all three routes.

route_desc_forest_free.message: Free weekly route · $N sessions · 6 Embers and one petal

weekly_nano_locked.message: The summary is free. PRO adds private Nano interpretation and trends.

project_paused.message: $N PRO project(s) are paused, not deleted.

ritual_pro_note.message: Free includes 1 ritual. PRO raises the limit to 8.

retouch_note.message: Your adult creature gets one free visual retouch.

memory_expedition.message: $N returned from $R with a new relic.

memory_birth.message: $N was born during a focus session.

diag_no_response.message: No response from the service worker.

share_local.message: Created on your device · no personal data

share_copy_fail.message: Could not copy it; you can save it

unlock_journey_desc.message: You can now see missions, your streak and daily progress.

unlock_play_desc.message: Minigames open and your creature can join you on the web.

unlock_collection_desc.message: Discover species, creatures and the life book.

unlock_shield_desc.message: Group sessions into projects and protect focus on sites you choose.

unlock_craft_desc.message: Grow, craft and customize with rewards earned by playing.

unlock_expeditions_desc.message: The weekly report and a free Forest journey open. PRO adds routes, affinities and Nano analysis.

unlock_mastery_desc.message: Visits, the Forge and advanced tools are now open.

project_limit.message: You can keep up to $N projects.

shield_off_summary.message: Off · you choose when and where it acts

shield_pro_note.message: PRO: up to 50 sites, ritual lists and automatic schedules.

shield_free_note.message: Free: up to 5 sites during an active session.

perkd_shield.message: Schedules, 50 sites, ritual lists and 12 projects.

trial_ready.message: Your PRO trial is ready and has not started yet.

trial_started.message: PRO trial activated: only days when you use focus count.

experience_label.message: How you want SlimeForge to accompany you

experience_note.message: Change it whenever you want. Focus tools are never locked.

experience_intro.message: All modes include the timer, goals, Shield, projects and pet. Only the game's prominence and how SlimeForge intervenes change.

experience_calm_desc.message: Prioritizes timer and Shield; hides Play and Collection to reduce stimuli.

experience_coach_desc.message: Recommended: gentle reminders, streaks, missions and pet reactions.

experience_game_desc.message: Keeps rewards, minigames, collection, garden and expeditions visible as you discover them.

experience_strict_desc.message: Prepares the firm Shield to block your configured sites during focus.

relic_ember_leaf_lore.message: Keeps the warmth of the first forest.

relic_dawn_antler_lore.message: Ancient light grows through its branches.

relic_echo_coin_lore.message: Each face remembers a different voice.

relic_runic_gear_lore.message: It still turns to the ruins' rhythm.

relic_resonant_crown_lore.message: It hums when a promise is fulfilled.

relic_moon_shell_lore.message: Holds a tide beneath the moon.

relic_tide_glass_lore.message: Shows currents that have not arrived.
